mapper.select:
select id, project_id as projectId, name, original_name as originalName, file_id as fileId, size, storage, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, create_user as createUser, update_user as updateUser from functional_case_xmind_file where project_id = #{request.projectId}
and (name like concat('%', #{request.keyword}, '%') or original_name like concat('%', #{request.keyword}, '%'))
